steps.title: Find the behavioral change the argument requires
steps.content: The student claims cultured meat can respond to “an expected widespread change in the public's behavior.” The supporting quote must identify what that behavioral change is.

steps.title: Match the shift to the choice
steps.content:
C identifies the behavioral change directly: increasing meat consumption by a growing population will drive up demand in the 21st century. This is the shift the argument requires—the rising demand cultured meat responds to. The other choices discuss packaging beliefs, flavor variations, or environmental benefits, but none establish the consumption change the argument needs.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
